sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n49147" key="qriambi/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θρῐαμβ-ίς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, pecul. fem. of <sense id="n49147.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">θριαμβικός, στολή</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anon.</author> </bibl> </cit> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
